policy: Release builds require VERIFY_RELEASE_RECORD=1 and an approved record before public distribution. PUBLIC_RELEASE=1 requires the record to name the final public AAB, matching artifact SHA-256, matching signing certificate SHA-256, and a public distribution channel.

release.agentBehaviorSummary: Remote OpenAI-style public read-only tool calls can execute through the local Agent runtime; mixed private, action, or side-effect batches fail closed before any tool runs.
unsupportedCapabilities: Local image semantic understanding for unverified or non-vision local models

blockers.riskNote: docs/model_license_review.json is pending license, redistribution, and attribution approval.
Production keystore and upload certificate SHA-256 are not recorded in this repository.
